flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mary Baldwin University fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mary Baldwin University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (38.8% → 31.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mary Baldwin University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (47.9% → 39.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mary Baldwin University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
